button.name: button_cancel
button.confirm: You are about to cancel this request and its related records. Please confirm!

field.name: help
field.p: Click to start a new Material request process.
A Material request is an instruction to Purchasing to procure a certain quantity of materials services, so that they are available at a certain point in time.

field.name: help
field.p: Click to start a new Material request process.
A Material request is an instruction to Purchasing to procure a certain quantity of materials services, so that they are available at a certain point in time.

field.name: help
field.p: Click to start a new Ovearseas Payment process.

field.name: help
field.p: Click to start a new Material request process.
A Material request is an instruction to Purchasing to procure a certain quantity of materials services, so that they are available at a certain point in time.
